rationale: Educ. Code §21.401 governs minimum service days for educator contracts. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct or consequential conflict exists.
quote: A contract between a school district and an educator must be for a minimum of 10 months' service.
_note: No conflict. §21.401 is substantively unrelated to homestead exemption amounts. Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts from reduced property tax revenue does not create a statutory conflict with this section.
